title: [F] getColumns(from, to) function similar to getRows()
author: Sammeeey
body:
## 🚀 Feature Proposal

Having a getColumns(from, to) function would be great - similar to the [getRows()](https://github.com/exceljs/exceljs#rows) function !

## Motivation

Would simplify selecting multiple columns drastically!

## Example

```js
// Get multiple column objects.
const cols = worksheet.getCols(5, 2); // start, length (>0, else undefined is returned)
```

OR

```js
// Get multiple column objects.
const cols = worksheet.getCols(5, 9); // firstCol, lastCol (>0, else undefined is returned)
```

comments.author: naorpeled
comments.body:
Hey @Sammeeey,
thanks for opening this issue.
Will aim to start working on this during this weekend 🙏

comments.author: Siemienik
comments.body: Hi @Sammeeey, we discussed this issue during MergeFest IV. We regularly organize meetings to discuss current and future developments in ExcelJS and other open-source projects. We coordinate on our Discord: https://discord.gg/siema. Feel free to join us if you would like to have an influence on this project's development 😄

comments.author: Sammeeey
comments.body:
Thanks @Siemienik !
Currently I'm using it *only* for work.
If we keep using it long-term I'll consider to contribute.
Feel free to remind me in case I raise other requests etc.😁

comments.author: Siemienik
comments.body: Just for reminder, if any feature or bug fix that your employer need can buy support on: consulting@siemienik.com or contact us on discord.
